title: Sugar-Free Tostones with Egg Roll Wrappers
description: A light and smoky Venezuelan dish featuring sugar-free tostones made from egg roll wrappers.
instructions: Mix together flour tortilla dough crumbs and cornstarch.
Soak the egg roll wrapper in cold water until soft, about 1 minute.
Cut into wedges or squares using a sharp knife or cookie cutter. Dry each piece on paper towels to remove excess moisture.
Dip one side of each wedge into the crumb mixture, then place them onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Repeat with remaining egg roll wrappers until all are coated and placed in oven.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until golden brown on both sides, flipping occasionally to ensure even browning.
Let cool slightly before serving. Store leftovers in an airtight container.
